Package component.modifier.combinator

Class Combinator

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.combinator.Combinator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Absorber, Duplicator, Merger, Splitter, Vaporizer
public abstract class Combinator extends Modifier
The Combinator class is an abstract base for modifiers that alter the card count within a GameLevel.

This class introduces the Material.STONE immunity logic. Because stone cards are heavy and immutable, they cannot be absorbed, merged, or split by combinator logic.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the combinator to its default state, specifically re-enabling it after it has been disabled.

      reset in class Modifier

    • getTooltip

      public Tooltip getTooltip()
      Retrieves the tooltip for this specific combinator instance.
      Specified by:
      getTooltip in interface Tippable
      Overrides:
      getTooltip in class Modifier
      Returns:
      A Tooltip based on the combinator's functional category.

    • getCombinatorTooltip

      public static Tooltip getCombinatorTooltip()
      Static helper that provides a standardized description for all combinator types.

      Useful for UI elements that need to explain the general concept of card combination and destruction.

      Returns:
      A Tooltip explaining that this component changes the total amount of cards in play.

    • checkStone

      public static boolean checkStone(Card card)
      Checks if a card is made of Stone and therefore immune to combinator effects.

      Stone cards act as an "anti-mechanic" for combinators, forcing players to find ways to change the material before they can merge or absorb the card.

      Parameters:
      card - The card to inspect.
      Returns:
      true if the card is made of Material.STONE.
